I attempted to create and write the sysctl configuration file `/etc/sysctl.d/99-disable-v6-forwarding.conf` in order to disable IPv6 forwarding as per the OpenSCAP finding. Unfortunately, the SSH session was terminated during the file write operation, so I was unable to confirm the file contents or reload the sysctl settings.  

Due to the lost connection, I cannot complete the remediation in this session. Please re-establish the connection and re-run the remediation steps, or let me know if you’d like me to attempt the configuration from a new session.
